seoTitle: How to Install Xray Test Management in Jira
metaDescription: Install Xray in Jira to bring structured test case management, test execution, and reporting directly into your projects.
intro: Xray is one of the more established test management apps for Jira, built for teams that need detailed test coverage tracking tied to their issues. This guide covers getting Xray installed and set up in a project.

steps.heading: Open the Atlassian Marketplace from Jira
steps.body: Go to your admin settings, open Apps, and search the Marketplace for Xray.

steps.heading: Install the Xray app
steps.body: Start the installation, which usually begins with a free evaluation period before requiring a license.

steps.heading: Enable Xray for your project
steps.body: Add the Xray test issue types and features to the specific project where you want to manage tests.

steps.heading: Set up test-related issue types
steps.body: Confirm that Test, Test Execution, and related issue types are available in your project's issue type scheme.

steps.heading: Create your first test case
steps.body: Open the Xray panel in the project and create a test to confirm everything is configured correctly.

faq.question: Is Xray free to try before buying?
faq.answer: Xray typically offers a free evaluation period through the Atlassian Marketplace before a paid license is required.

faq.question: Do I need Jira admin rights to install Xray?
faq.answer: Yes, installing apps from the Marketplace requires Jira administrator permissions.

faq.question: Can Xray tests link to existing bugs or stories?
faq.answer: Yes, Xray tests and test executions can be linked to related issues so coverage traces back to the actual requirements.

faq.question: Does Xray work with both Jira Cloud and Data Center?
faq.answer: Xray offers versions for both Jira Cloud and Jira Data Center, though setup steps differ between them.
